/usr/bin/clang++ -g CMakeFiles/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality.dir/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality.dir/src/ui/EditVehicleDialog.cpp.o -o Lab5_PluginsFunctionality  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baks/code/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality/build libVehicleLib.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
